<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Waterslang (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gŭi-sê̤ṳ]][[de:Wasser-Schlange]][[en:Water Snake (Chinese zodiac)]][[fr:Serpent d'eau (astrologie)]][[hak:Kui-sṳ]][[ja:癸巳]][[ko:계사 (간지)]][[nds:Water-Snaak]][[vi:Quý Tỵ]][[za:Gveiqceih]][[zh-min-nan:Kùi-sū]][[zh-yue:癸巳]][[zh:癸巳]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Waterslang (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gŭi-sê̤ṳ]][[de:Wasser-Schlange]][[en:Water Snake (Chinese zodiac)]][[fr:Serpent d'eau (astrologie)]][[hak:Kui-sṳ]][[ja:癸巳]][[ko:계사 (간지)]][[nds:Water-Snaak]][[vi:Quý Tỵ]][[za:Gveiqceih]][[zh-min-nan:Kùi-sū]][[zh-yue:癸巳]][[zh:癸巳]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Waterslang (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gŭi-sê̤ṳ]][[de:Wasser-Schlange]][[en:Water Snake (Chinese zodiac)]][[fr:Serpent d'eau (astrologie)]][[hak:Kui-sṳ]][[ja:癸巳]][[ko:계사 (간지)]][[nds:Water-Snaak]][[vi:Quý Tỵ]][[za:Gveiqceih]][[zh-min-nan:Kùi-sū]][[zh-yue:癸巳]][[zh:癸巳]]

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Snake|kanji=癸巳|romaji=mizunoto mi|onyomi=kishi|p=guǐsì|w=kuei-ssu|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ sɨ|y=gwai2 si6|j=gwai2 si6|ci=kʷɐi siː|mc=kjwɨj si|oc-bs=kʷeʔ si|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Water Snake also known as  Mizunotomi''' (癸巳) is one element of the {{ill|Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|ja|Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

It is the 30th combination in the Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive, preceded by {{ill|Renchen|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchen|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Kougo|ja|1=Yang Wood Horse|2=ja|甲午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} of the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} represents yin water, while the {{ill|Snake|ja|巳|1=Snake (Zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|2=ja|3=巳|1=Snake (zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake (zodiac)|qq=}} of the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Twelve Earthly Branches|1=Earthly Branches}} represents yin fire, and according to the principle of {{ill|Five Elements Theory: Mutual Destruction|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=Mutual Destruction|lt_ja=相剋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Five Elements Theory: Mutual Destruction|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (water overcomes fire).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Water Snake (癸巳)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐsì
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 si6
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-mi
***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-mi
***Onyomi 1: kisi
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gisa (계사)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Tỵ

<!--
==
* Yin Water Snake (癸巳) 
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐsì
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 sei3
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi: みずのとみ (mizunoto-mi)
***Onyomi: きかのみ (kika-no-mi)
***Onyomi: きび (kibi)
** Korean (Revised Romanization): gyesa
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Tỵ

-->
==Years of Yin Water Snake==
A year in the {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} that yields a remainder of 33 when divided by 60 is considered a Mizunotomi {{ill|Year|en|Year|WD=Q577|lt=year|1=Year}}.
{| class="wikitable"
|+'''Year of Mizunotomi'''
|-
! {{ill|1st millennium|en|1st millennium|WD=Q25868|lt=1st Millennium|1=1st millennium}} !! {{ill|2nd millennium|en|2nd millennium|WD=Q25860|lt=2nd Millennium|1=2nd millennium}} !! {{ill|3rd millennium|en|3rd millennium|WD=Q26224|lt=3rd Millennium|1=3rd millennium}}
|-
|
* {{ill|AD 33|en|AD 33|WD=Q23779|lt=33 AD|1=AD 33}}
* {{ill|AD 93|en|AD 93|WD=Q30965|lt=93 AD|1=AD 93}}
* {{ill|153|en|153|WD=Q24577|lt=153 AD|1=153}}
* {{ill|213|en|213|WD=Q32955|lt=213 AD|1=213}}
* {{ill|273|en|273|WD=Q32466|lt=273 AD|1=273}}
* {{ill|333|en|333|WD=Q32007|lt=333 AD|1=333}}
* {{ill|393|en|393|WD=Q48123|lt=393 AD|1=393}}
* {{ill|453|en|453|WD=Q30269|lt=453 AD|1=453}}
* {{ill|513|en|513|WD=Q32887|lt=513 AD|1=513}}
* {{ill|573|en|573|WD=Q33908|lt=573 AD|1=573}}
* {{ill|633|en|633|WD=Q33288|lt=633 AD|1=633}}
* {{ill|693|en|693|WD=Q23480|lt=693 AD|1=693}}
* {{ill|753|en|753|WD=Q23642|lt=753 AD|1=753}}
* {{ill|813|en|813|WD=Q30360|lt=813 AD|1=813}}
* {{ill|873|en|873|WD=Q30369|lt=873 AD|1=873}}
* {{ill|933|en|933|WD=Q24014|lt=933 AD|1=933}}
* {{ill|993|en|993|WD=Q24080|lt=993 AD|1=993}}
|
* {{ill|1053|en|1053|WD=Q19368|lt=1053 AD|1=1053}}
* {{ill|1113|en|1113|WD=Q19531|lt=1113 AD|1=1113}}
* {{ill|1173|en|1173|WD=Q19688|lt=1173 AD|1=1173}}
* {{ill|1233|en|1233|WD=Q5421|lt=1233 AD|1=1233}}
* {{ill|1293|en|1293|WD=Q5557|lt=1293 AD|1=1293}}
* {{ill|1353|en|1353|WD=Q6116|lt=1353 AD|1=1353}}
* {{ill|1413|en|1413|WD=Q6169|lt=1413 AD|1=1413}}
* {{ill|1473|en|1473|WD=Q6594|lt=1473 AD|1=1473}}
* {{ill|1533|en|1533|WD=Q6443|lt=1533 AD|1=1533}}
* {{ill|1593|en|1593|WD=Q6772|lt=1593 AD|1=1593}}
* {{ill|1653|en|1653|WD=Q6965|lt=1653 AD|1=1653}}
* {{ill|1713|en|1713|WD=Q6873|lt=1713 AD|1=1713}}
* {{ill|1773|en|1773|WD=Q7692|lt=1773 AD|1=1773}}
* {{ill|1833|en|1833|WD=Q7587|lt=1833 AD|1=1833}}
* {{ill|1893|en|1893|WD=Q7840|lt=1893 AD|1=1893}}
* {{ill|1953|en|1953|WD=Q18585|lt=1953 AD|1=1953}}
|
* {{ill|2013|en|2013|WD=Q1998|lt=2013 AD|1=2013}}
* {{ill|2073 AD|ja|2073年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2073 AD|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 2070年代|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}
* {{ill|2133 AD|ja|2133年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2133 AD|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 22世紀|1=22nd century|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11177}}
* {{ill|2193 AD|ja|2193年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2193 AD|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 22世紀|1=22nd century|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11177}}
* {{ill|2253 AD|ja|2253年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2253 AD|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 23世紀|1=23rd century|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q49832}}
* {{ill|2313 AD|ja|2313年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2313 AD|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 24世紀|1=24th century|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q49838}}
* {{ill|2373 AD|ja|2373年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2373 AD|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 24世紀|1=24th century|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q49838}}
* {{ill|2433 AD|ja|2433年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2433 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2493 AD|ja|2493年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2493 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2553 AD|ja|2553年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2553 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2613 AD|ja|2613年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2613 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2673 AD|ja|2673年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2673 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2733 AD|ja|2733年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2733 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2793 AD|ja|2793年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2793 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2853 AD|ja|2853年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2853 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2913 AD|ja|2913年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2913 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2973 AD|ja|2973年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2973 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
|}

==Months of Yin Water Snake==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the Heavenly Stem is {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|April|en|April|WD=Q118|lt=April|1=April}} is considered the Mizunotomi {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month|1=Month}}. However, the month referred to here may also be based on the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or on the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term|1=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Lixia|en|Lixia|WD=Q1191007|lt=Lixia|1=Lixia}} to the day before {{ill|Mangzhong|en|Mangzhong|WD=Q1147880|lt=Bōshu|1=Mangzhong}}).

==Days of Yin Water Snake==
The selection of auspicious days for Mizunotomi is as follows.
===Selected Day===
The Mizunotomi day is the 10th (final) day of {{ill|Ten Directions|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Directions|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}} and the 1st day of {{ill|Tian Yi Tianshang|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tian Yi Tianshang|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

==Related Topics==
* {{prefix|qq=}}
* {{intitle|qq=}}

[[zh-min-nan:Teng-chháu]]
[[zh-yue:丁酉]]

{{translated page|ja|癸巳|version=84123801|comment=Imported full ja history}}



[[cdo:Dĭng-cṳ̄de]]
[[nds:Holt-Hahnvi]]
[[de:Yin Water Snake]]

[[ja:癸巳]]
[[zh:癸巳]]
[[ko:계사 (간지)]]
[[fr:Serpent de eau]]
[[de:Wasser-Schlange]]

[[af:Vuurhaan (astrologie)]]
[[de:Feuer-Hahneen]]
[[en:Fire Rooster]]
[[fr:Coq de feushak]]
[[it:Ding-chṳ́id]]

[[ko:정유 (간지)]]
[[vi:Đinh Dậu]]
[[za:Dingceij]]
[[zh:丁酉]]
[[ar:Yin Water Snake]]

<!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--><!--Yin Water Snake--><!--Yin Water Snake-->

<!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
[[af:Waterslang (astrologie)]]
[[cdo:Gŭi-sê̤ṳ]]
[[en:Water Snake (Chinese zodiac)]]
[[fr:Serpent d'eau (astrologie)]]
[[hak:Kui-sṳ]]
[[nds:Water-Snaak]]
[[vi:Quý Tỵ]]
[[za:Gveiqceih]]
[[zh-min-nan:Kùi-sū]]
[[zh-yue:癸巳]]
<!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
[[af:Waterslang (astrologie)]]
[[cdo:Gŭi-sê̤ṳ]]
[[en:Water Snake (Chinese zodiac)]]
[[fr:Serpent d'eau (astrologie)]]
[[hak:Kui-sṳ]]
[[nds:Water-Snaak]]
[[vi:Quý Tỵ]]
[[za:Gveiqceih]]
[[zh-min-nan:Kùi-sū]]
[[zh-yue:癸巳]]
{{wikidata link|Q905297}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]]
[[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
[[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
